title: Recipes
body:
You can find the recipes in the gallery.

These recipes for getting some rare items that aren't as amazing as people think. For example, the totem of undying normally requires you to find a Woodland Mansion (Which is usually thousands of blocks away from spawn), then kill an in Evoker (which spawn vexes, which are impossible to kill) just to get a single totem of undying. These recipes will also help newer players get items that seem impossible to them. (Also the horse armor just really annoys me because Mojang couldn't add three more recipes for horse armor, so I added that).
